meta.discount_formula: dealer_cost = MSRP × 0.36  (64% off MSRP — verified from live PIC orders)

PREMIUM_ROLLER_SERIES.source: Updated to match verified ROLLER SKYLINE rate (64%) — applied uniformly per Phase 1A conclusion

meta.discount_note: ALL roller shade products carry a 64% PIC discount (dealer pays 36% of list price). Verified from live PIC orders 80912, 95256, 98500 for Roller Skyline; applied to PREMIUM ROLLER SERIES per Phase 1A conclusion. Discount applies to (List + Surcharge) combined — e.g. order 95256: (444 + 1065) × 0.36 = 543.24.
meta.surcharge_discount_verified: Discount applies to (List + Surcharge) combined — e.g. order 95256: (444 + 1065) × 0.36 = 543.24 unit cost.
meta.note: All prices USD. Width/height in inches. Grid is [height_index][width_index].

top_treatment_surcharges.note: Width-based. Add to base shade price. MSRP values.

motorization_automate_rollease.note: Automate / Rollease Acmeda motors. MSRP. Add to base price.

bottom_up_skyline.note: Wider systems on inquiry. Add to shade base price.
